2025... what a year🥹 I said yes to my best friend, became a wife, traveled across the world, and experienced moments I used to pray for. November by far was my favorite month with St. Lucia sunsets for our honeymoon and the wedding day itself 🥹❤️ I can’t be more grateful for where rugby has taken me, who it has allowed me to meet, and for the way I get to spend my time every single day getting better! Grateful for every memory, every flight, every blessing. ✈️🤍
